params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Checks the purchase and consumption status of an in-app product. Returns the purchase details including the purchase state, consumption state, and order ID.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Acknowledges a purchase of an in-app item. Purchases that are not acknowledged within three days are automatically refunded.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Consumes a purchase for an in-app item. Consumed purchases can be purchased again, making this appropriate for consumable items.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The subscription ID (e.g., monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Checks whether a user's subscription purchase is valid and returns its expiry time. Includes information about auto-renewal status, payment state, cancellation reason, and linked purchase token.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The subscription ID (e.g., monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Acknowledges a subscription purchase. Subscriptions that are not acknowledged within three days are automatically refunded.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The subscription ID (e.g., monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Cancels a user's subscription purchase. The subscription remains valid until its expiration time and will not be auto-renewed.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The subscription ID (e.g., monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Defers a user's subscription purchase until a specified future expiration time. The user retains access to the subscription content during the deferral period.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The subscription ID (e.g., monthly_sub).

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Refunds and immediately revokes a user's subscription purchase. Access to the subscription is terminated immediately and a refund is issued. This cannot be undone.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: token
params.description: The token provided to the user's device when the purchase was made. Used to uniquely identify a purchase.

items.docs: Gets the latest subscription purchase state using the Purchases Subscriptions v2 API. Returns detailed information about the subscription including line items, external account identifiers, and subscription state.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: startTime
params.description: The time (in milliseconds since Epoch) of the oldest voided purchase to return. Defaults to 30 days before the current time.

params.name: endTime
params.description: The time (in milliseconds since Epoch) of the newest voided purchase to return.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default and maximum is 1000.

params.name: startIndex
params.description: Index of the first result to return.

params.name: token
params.description: Continuation token for paging through results.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of voided purchases to return. 0 for voided in-app product purchases, 1 for voided subscription purchases.

items.docs: Lists the purchases that were cancelled, refunded, or charged back. Voided purchases include both in-app product purchases and subscription purchases.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of subscriptions to return.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token for pagination.

params.name: showArchived
params.description: Whether to include archived subscriptions in the response.

items.docs: Lists all subscriptions defined for the specified application. Returns subscription metadata including product IDs, listings, and base plans.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The ID to use for the subscription. Must be unique within the app.

params.name: regionsVersion.version
params.description: The version of the available regions being used.

items.docs: Creates a new subscription for an application. The subscription must include at least one base plan and listing.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

items.docs: Reads a single subscription product configuration, including its base plans, offers, and regional pricing.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: updateMask
params.description: The list of fields to update in this subscription. Uses FieldMask format.

params.name: regionsVersion.version
params.description: The version of the available regions being used.

params.name: latencyTolerance
params.description: Tolerance for propagation latency. PRODUCT_UPDATE_LATENCY_TOLERANCE_LATENCY_SENSITIVE or PRODUCT_UPDATE_LATENCY_TOLERANCE_LATENCY_TOLERANT.

items.docs: Updates an existing subscription product configuration. Supports partial updates via the updateMask field.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

items.docs: Deletes a subscription. A subscription can only be deleted if it has never had a base plan published.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: basePlanId
params.description: The unique identifier of the base plan. Base plans define the billing period and renewal type for a subscription.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of offers to return.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Page token for pagination.

items.docs: Lists all offers for a given subscription's base plan. Returns offer details including eligibility criteria and pricing phases.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: productId
params.description: The product ID of the in-app product or subscription (e.g., premium_upgrade, monthly_sub).

params.name: basePlanId
params.description: The unique identifier of the base plan. Base plans define the billing period and renewal type for a subscription.

params.name: offerId
params.description: The ID to use for the offer. Must be unique within the base plan.

params.name: regionsVersion.version
params.description: The version of the available regions being used.

items.docs: Creates a new subscription offer. An offer represents special pricing or a free trial for a base plan.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of reviews to return.

params.name: startIndex
params.description: Index of the first review to return.

params.name: token
params.description: Continuation token for paging through results.

params.name: translationLanguage
params.description: BCP-47 language tag for translation. If specified, reviews in other languages will be translated to this language.

items.docs: Lists all reviews for the specified application. Returns the latest user comment and any developer reply for each review.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

params.name: translationLanguage
params.description: BCP-47 language tag for translating the review text.

items.docs: Gets a single review by its ID. Returns the user comment, star rating, and any developer reply.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

items.docs: Replies to a single review or updates an existing reply. Only one reply per review is allowed.

params.name: packageName
params.description: The package name of the application (e.g., com.example.myapp). This is the unique identifier for the app on Google Play.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The order ID from Google Play.

params.name: revoke
params.description: Whether to revoke the purchased item. If true, access to the subscription or in-app product is terminated immediately.

items.docs: Refunds a user's subscription or in-app purchase order. This initiates a refund through Google Play and the user retains access until the end of the current billing period for subscriptions.
